ca is an interactive system from Wolfram (http://www.wolfram.com) for doing mathematical computation. It handles numeric, symbolic, and graphical calculations and incorporates a high-level programming language. Mathematica produces graphics

amming language. Mathematica produces graphics in PostScript form. Mathematica and licenses are available from https://software.berkeley.edu/mathematica. MATHEMATICA on EECS Instructional Systems -----------------------------------------

ystems ----------------------------------------- MATHEMATICA is not installed on any EECS Instructional computers. For historical reference, please see /share/b/pub/mathematica-old.help. MATHEMATICA Licenses for all UCB Users ----------------

MATICA Licenses for all UCB Users -------------------------------------- There is a MATHEMATICA site license for UC Berkeley (2015-16). See https://software.berkeley.edu/mathematica. MATHEMATICA open-source alternatives -----------------------
